reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Un lindo lugar para abrevar los caballos, hay pulpería y sombra para el mate! Y se continúa camino fresco.

(Translated by Google)
A nice place to water the horses, there's a grocery store and shade for mate! And the cool trail continues.

reviews.comment:
Mucha espera para cargar combustible y sentido mar del plata hay que dar mucha vuelta para llegar. Los baños sucios en atención a la cantidad de gente que para. Hay arboleda para parar un rato

(Translated by Google)
Long waits for fuel, and heading towards Mar del Plata, you have to take a long detour. The restrooms are dirty due to the number of people who stop. There's a wooded area where you can stop for a while.
